title: LootBags Plus
description: LootBags+ adds special loot bags that drop from mobs. Open them to receive random rewards and surprise loot!
body:
**🎒 LootBags Plus**

Turn every fight into a treasure hunt! ⚔️✨

LootBags Plus adds random loot bags that drop from entities when they are killed — giving you exciting rewards with every battle.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**💀 How It Works**

🗡️ When an entity is killed, it has a 40% chance to drop a Loot Bag.

🎒 When opening a Loot Bag, there is a 30% chance to receive bonus item drops.

🎁 Rewards are completely random and can range from useful gear to extremely rare treasures.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**💎 Possible Rewards**

Loot Bags can contain:

✨ Enchanted gear

🏰 Dungeon loot

🏙️ End City treasure (1% ultra-rare chance!)

🔥 Powerful OP items

📦 And much more…

Every bag is a surprise!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🌍 Mod Compatibility**

✅ Fully works with modded entities

✅ Compatible with custom mobs

✅ Designed to fit both vanilla and modded gameplay

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e0729a8e0aaefdb40bd23d75bfa27f5aea5aae4.png)

![drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bb163ef1484f03c210ce72554a9f97101c185ec.png)
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
